name: Model Shingle Maker
description: Parametric SVG creator to make cut files for model roof shingles. Adjust sizes, rows, shapes, and gaps.

name: Stone Block Generator
description: Parametric SVG creator for stone walls or floors using randomized Voronoi cell generation.

name: Kirigami Paper
description: Parametric SVG creator for expandable kirigami paper packing materials based on tension-activated slit patterns.
